# PicBoost - AI Image Enhancer

> Free, no watermark, no sign-up AI image enhancement tool.

## What is PicBoost?

PicBoost is a free online AI image enhancement tool that lets you:
- Enhance image quality (sharpening, noise reduction, color correction)
- Upscale images to 2x or 4x resolution (up to 4K)
- Fix blurry photos with AI deblurring
- Remove backgrounds from images (Pro feature)

## Key Features

- **No watermark**: Enhanced images are clean, no logos or watermarks ever
- **No sign-up required**: Use immediately without creating an account
- **Free daily usage**: 5 free enhancements per day for unauthenticated users
- **Fast processing**: Most images enhanced in 5-15 seconds
- **Privacy focused**: Images are processed and can be deleted immediately

## Pricing

- **Free**: 5 images/day, 2x upscale, no watermark, no sign-up required
- **Starter ($9.9/month)**: 50 images/day, 4x upscale, batch processing, all modes
- **Pro ($19.9/month)**: Unlimited images, 8x upscale, API access, fastest speed

## How to Use

1. Go to https://picboost.com/enhance
2. Drag and drop or click to upload an image (JPG, PNG, or WebP, max 10MB)
3. Select enhancement mode (Enhance, Upscale, or Unblur)
4. Click "Enhance Image"
5. Preview the before/after comparison
6. Download your enhanced image

## Supported Formats

- Input: JPG, PNG, WebP
- Output: PNG, JPG
- Maximum file size: 10MB
- Maximum output resolution: Up to 8K (Pro plan)

## Technology

- AI Engine: Real-ESRGAN via Cloudflare Workers AI
- Infrastructure: Cloudflare Pages, Workers, R2, D1, Queues
- Global CDN: Cloudflare edge network for low latency worldwide

## Links

- Homepage: https://picboost.com
- Image Enhancer: https://picboost.com/enhance
- Image Upscaler: https://picboost.com/upscale
- Unblur Photos: https://picboost.com/unblur
- Pricing: https://picboost.com/pricing
- Blog: https://picboost.com/blog
